scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w microservices/gateway" "npm run dev -w microservices/auth-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/marketplace-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/booking-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/investment-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/wallet-service" "npm run dev -w microservices/chat-service"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start -w microservices/gateway" "npm run start -w microservices/auth-service" "npm run start -w microservices/marketplace-service" "npm run start -w microservices/booking-service" "npm run start -w microservices/investment-service" "npm run start -w microservices/wallet-service" "npm run start -w microservices/chat-service"
